Headline: Forest Park-bound Blue Line Service Delayed near Rosemont
ShortDescription: Forest Park-bound Blue Line trains are standing near Rosemont due to a sick customer. Crews working to restore service.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Forest Park-bound Blue Line trains are standing near Rosemont due to a sick customer. 

Consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes or using buses to other rail lines.

These may include:

#88 Higgins

#90 Harlem

#56 Milwaukee

Personnel are working to restore service. Allow extra travel time.
